sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Purple Biotech CEO Gil Efron To Step Down For Health Reasons
feed.summary: Purple Biotech Ltd. announced that its CEO, Gil Efron, will step down from his role in August due to health considerations. Efron will transition to lead corporate development, and the company has begun a search for a new chief executive. Shares of Purple Biotech closed down 4.24% on the Nasdaq following the announcement.

feed.title: $PFSI Stock Loss Alert: PennyMac Financial Services
feed.summary: Bleichmar Fonti & Auld LLP is investigating PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. (NYSE:PFSI) for potential federal securities law violations. The investigation stems from PennyMac's disappointing Q4 2025 financial results, where the company's senior management revealed that increased origination capacity by competitors hindered PennyMac's ability to capitalize on refinancing opportunities. This news led to a more than 37% drop in PennyMac's stock price, impacting investors who may now have legal recourse.
